rules.title: Network IOC Detection [4cd3dc6e9576]
rules.content:
title: CDB SENTINEL APEX - Network Threat Intel [4cd3dc6e9576]
id: cdb-net-4cd3dc6e9576
status: production
description: >
    Auto-generated detection rule for 8 malicious IPs and 52 malicious domains
    from CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX threat intelligence feeds.
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX v51
date: 2026-05-01
modified: 2026-05-01
tags:
    - attack.command_and_control
    - attack.t1071
    - attack.t1090
logsource:
    category: firewall
    product: any
detection:
    selection:
        DestinationIp:
            - '45.78.214.188'
            - '49.51.68.143'
            - '149.50.97.144'
            - '6.5.0.4'
            - '8.2.0.25'
            - '7.3.1.1'

            - '0aa0cf0637d66c0d.com'
            - '31d58c226fc5a0aa976e13ca9ecebcc8.com'
            - '3k7m1n9p4q2r6s8t0v5w2x4y6z8u9.com'

            - 'a8d3b9e1f5c7024d6e0b7a2c9f1d83e5.com'
            - 'aa86a52a98162b7d.com'
            - 'af4760df2c08896a9638e26e7dd20aae.com'
            - 'asdk2.com'
            - 'b5e9a2d7f4c8e3b1a0d6f2e9c5b8a7d.com'
            - 'cfe47df26c8eaf0a7c136b50c703e173.com'

            - 'academy.canonical.com'

rules.title: Phishing Detection [4cd3dc6e9576]
rules.content:
title: CDB SENTINEL APEX - Phishing Sender Detection [4cd3dc6e9576]
id: cdb-phish-4cd3dc6e9576
status: production
description: Detects emails from known malicious senders
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX v51
date: 2026-05-01
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
    - attack.t1566
logsource:
    category: email
    product: any
detection:
    selection:
        SenderAddress:
            - 'E911Support@intrado.com'
            - 'bivash@cyberdudebivash.com'
            - 'soc_team@company.com'
            - 'bmccann@accuvant.com'
            - 'smilingraccoon@gmail.com'
    condition: selection
level: high
falsepositives:
    - Spoofed sender addresses
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
